title: Implement Interrogator Module
description: Develop the module that interacts with both the AI and Human-Proxy Respondents. It should be capable of initiating dialogue sessions, recording conversation history, and submitting guesses about each respondent's identity.

title: Develop AI Respondent
description: Create the AI Respondent module that generates human-like responses. It should maintain the context of the conversation to ensure coherent dialogue.

title: Create Human-Proxy Respondent
description: Build the Human-Proxy Respondent module that simulates human interaction using predefined scripts or logic-based responses. It should alter response styles periodically to mimic real human conversations.

title: Design Evaluation Mechanism
description: Develop the evaluation mechanism to assess the accuracy of the interrogator’s guesses, calculate the success rate, and provide feedback for improving future iterations.
